rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE KATHLEEN A. MCKENZIE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Accepting Resignation Of Trustee And For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. Order revised as follows: the court makes no finding re the disposition of the residue of the trust, so the designation of all parties as 1/3 residuary beneficiaries was struck; and the caption of the petition is for an order accepting the resignation of the current trustee and appointing the successor only, so item #5 in the order was struck.
